title: Grandkids’ Christmas Stocking Tree
summary: For those of you who do not have a fireplace to hang stockings on, these Christmas Stocking Trees will do the trick.
description: For those of you who do not have a fireplace to hang stockings on, these Christmas Stocking Trees will do the trick. I constructed two for each of our grandkids'

steps.title: Drill holes in feet
steps.body: Drill counter sunk holes in the feet in locations as shown

steps.title: Install the feet
steps.body: Install the feet utilizing 3" wood screws

steps.title: Install the cap
steps.body: Install the post cap by glueing and nailing the cap in place.

steps.title: Install the fineal
steps.body: Install the finial screwing through the wood cap into the post

steps.title: Sand and paint
steps.body: Fill the screw holes, sand and paint the post, cap and feet in any color you desire. Add decorative holiday custom mdf shapes and personalize with mdf letters.
